requirement_topic.en: Sea transport — UN 38.3 and IMDG dangerous-goods classification

summary.en: All BESS lithium-ion batteries shipped to Seychelles by sea must comply with UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) and the International Maritime Dangerous Goods (IMDG) Code. UN 38.3 test reports are mandatory for international sea freight of lithium cells and batteries. Port Victoria (Seychelles) is the sole entry port; IMDG compliance documentation must be presented to the shipping line and port authority.
summary.zh: 所有通过海运发往塞舌尔的BESS锂离子电池须符合UN 38.3（《关于危险货物运输的建议书——测试和标准》第三部分第38.3节）及《国际海运危险货物规则》（IMDG规则）。UN 38.3测试报告是锂电池单体和电池组国际海运的强制要求。维多利亚港（塞舌尔）是唯一入境港口；须向船运公司和港口当局提交IMDG合规文件。
summary.zht: 所有通過海運發往塞席爾的BESS鋰離子電池須符合UN 38.3（《關於危險貨物運輸的建議書——測試和標準》第三部分第38.3節）及《國際海運危險貨物規則》（IMDG規則）。UN 38.3測試報告是鋰電池單體和電池組國際海運的強制要求。維多利亞港（塞席爾）是唯一入境港口；須向船運公司和港口當局提交IMDG合規文件。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Tests and Criteria, Rev.7, 2019 + Amend. 1)
IMDG Code 2022 (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code, Amendment 41-22)
SOLAS 1974 as amended (Chapter VII — Carriage of Dangerous Goods)

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 test reports for export of lithium batteries under GB/T 28164-2011 and the civil aviation and maritime dangerous goods transport regulations enforced by CAAC and MOT. Chinese manufacturers typically obtain UN 38.3 reports from accredited Chinese laboratories (e.g., CBTL, CTI). These reports are internationally valid if the laboratory is UN 38.3 accredited — the standard itself is the same. The gap is documentation completeness and cell-level vs. system-level scope.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB/T 28164-2011及民航局和交通运输部执行的民航及海运危险品运输法规，要求出口锂电池提供UN 38.3测试报告。中国制造商通常从认可中国实验室（如CBTL、CTI）获取UN 38.3报告。如实验室经UN 38.3认可，这些报告国际有效——标准本身相同。差距在于文件完整性及电芯级与系统级的范围。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB/T 28164-2011及民航局和交通運輸部執行的民航及海運危險品運輸法規，要求出口鋰電池提供UN 38.3測試報告。中國製造商通常從認可中國實驗室（如CBTL、CTI）獲取UN 38.3報告。如實驗室經UN 38.3認可，這些報告國際有效——標準本身相同。差距在於文件完整性及電芯級與系統級的範圍。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 28164-2011 (Secondary lithium cells and batteries for portable applications — transport tests)
IATA DGR (for air freight — separate from sea freight scope)

gap.en: The UN 38.3 standard is internationally uniform — a valid UN 38.3 test report from any accredited laboratory is accepted globally. The practical gaps are: (1) scope: the UN 38.3 report must cover the specific cell model and battery configuration being shipped — not a similar but different model; (2) system-level: large BESS modules shipped as a single unit may require UN 38.3 testing at module/system level, not just cell level; (3) IMDG shipping documentation (DGD, SDS, container packing certificate) must be complete and accurate; and (4) State of Charge (SOC) limits for sea transport must comply with IMDG special provision 376 (max 30% SOC for lithium-ion batteries unless otherwise approved).
gap.zh: UN 38.3标准国际统一——任何认可实验室出具的有效UN 38.3测试报告在全球均被接受。实际差距为：（1）范围：UN 38.3报告须覆盖所发运的具体电芯型号和电池配置——而非相似但不同的型号；（2）系统级：作为单一设备发运的大型BESS模组可能需要在模组/系统级而非仅电芯级进行UN 38.3测试；（3）IMDG运输文件（危险货物申报单、安全数据表、集装箱装箱证书）须完整准确；（4）海运荷电状态（SOC）限制须符合IMDG特殊规定376（锂离子电池最高30% SOC，除非另有批准）。
gap.zht: UN 38.3標準國際統一——任何認可實驗室出具的有效UN 38.3測試報告在全球均被接受。實際差距為：（1）範圍：UN 38.3報告須覆蓋所發運的具體電芯型號和電池配置——而非相似但不同的型號；（2）系統級：作為單一設備發運的大型BESS模組可能需要在模組/系統級而非僅電芯級進行UN 38.3測試；（3）IMDG運輸文件（危險貨物申報單、安全數據表、集裝箱裝箱證書）須完整準確；（4）海運荷電狀態（SOC）限制須符合IMDG特殊規定376（鋰離子電池最高30% SOC，除非另有批准）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IMDG Code requirement for all international sea freight of lithium batteries
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export — same standard (UN 38.3); typically already held by Chinese exporters

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Dangerous Goods

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is an internationally uniform standard — Chinese laboratory test reports are valid if the laboratory is accredited. However, exporters must verify: (a) the UN 38.3 report covers the exact cell model and battery configuration being shipped to Seychelles; (b) large BESS modules have been tested at the appropriate level (module/system, not cell-only); and (c) full IMDG shipping documentation including 30% SOC compliance is in order. Port Victoria is the sole entry point — incomplete documentation will cause port detention.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3是国际统一标准——如实验室经认可，中国实验室测试报告有效。但出口商须核验：（a）UN 38.3报告覆盖发运至塞舌尔的具体电芯型号和电池配置；（b）大型BESS模组已在适当级别（模组/系统级，而非仅电芯级）完成测试；（c）包括30% SOC合规的完整IMDG运输文件齐备。维多利亚港是唯一入境点——文件不完整将导致港口扣押。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3是國際統一標準——如實驗室經認可，中國實驗室測試報告有效。但出口商須核驗：（a）UN 38.3報告覆蓋發運至塞席爾的具體電芯型號和電池配置；（b）大型BESS模組已在適當級別（模組/系統級，而非僅電芯級）完成測試；（c）包括30% SOC合規的完整IMDG運輸文件齊備。維多利亞港是唯一入境點——文件不完整將導致港口扣押。

requirement_topic.en: Transport safety — IEC 62281 safety in transport

summary.en: IEC 62281:2019 (Safety of primary and secondary lithium cells and batteries during transport) specifies safety requirements for lithium cells and batteries during transport, complementing UN 38.3 test requirements. SBS and project specifications for BESS shipments to Seychelles reference IEC 62281 as the product-level transport safety standard alongside UN 38.3. IEC 62281 covers protection against external short circuit, overcharge, forced discharge, and mechanical damage during transport.
summary.zh: IEC 62281:2019（运输过程中一次和二次锂电池单体及电池组的安全）规定了运输过程中锂电池单体和电池组的安全要求，是UN 38.3测试要求的补充。SBS和发往塞舌尔BESS货运的项目规格将IEC 62281作为产品级运输安全标准，与UN 38.3并列引用。IEC 62281涵盖运输过程中对外部短路、过充、强制放电和机械损伤的防护。
summary.zht: IEC 62281:2019（運輸過程中一次和二次鋰電池單體及電池組的安全）規定了運輸過程中鋰電池單體和電池組的安全要求，是UN 38.3測試要求的補充。SBS和發往塞席爾BESS貨運的項目規格將IEC 62281作為產品級運輸安全標準，與UN 38.3並列引用。IEC 62281涵蓋運輸過程中對外部短路、過充、強制放電和機械損傷的防護。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62281:2019 (Safety of primary and secondary lithium cells and batteries during transport)

summary.en: China's GB/T 28164-2011 is the national standard for secondary lithium cells and batteries for portable applications during transport. For larger BESS modules, GB/T 36276-2023 and GB 38031-2020 include transport-related test clauses. Chinese manufacturers exporting to Seychelles typically hold UN 38.3 reports — IEC 62281 certification from an accredited body is an additional requirement that not all Chinese manufacturers hold for stationary BESS products.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 28164-2011是便携式应用二次锂电池单体和电池组运输的国家标准。对于较大的BESS模组，GB/T 36276-2023和GB 38031-2020包含运输相关测试条款。出口至塞舌尔的中国制造商通常持有UN 38.3报告——来自认可机构的IEC 62281认证是额外要求，并非所有中国制造商均持有固定BESS产品的此类认证。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 28164-2011是便攜式應用二次鋰電池單體和電池組運輸的國家標準。對於較大的BESS模組，GB/T 36276-2023和GB 38031-2020包含運輸相關測試條款。出口至塞席爾的中國製造商通常持有UN 38.3報告——來自認可機構的IEC 62281認證是額外要求，並非所有中國製造商均持有固定BESS產品的此類認證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 28164-2011 (Secondary lithium cells and batteries — portable applications — transport tests)

gap.en: IEC 62281 certification is an additional requirement beyond UN 38.3 for SBS and project specifications in Seychelles. Chinese manufacturers who hold UN 38.3 reports but not IEC 62281 certification must obtain IEC 62281 conformity evidence from an accredited body. The IEC 62281 test suite partially overlaps with UN 38.3 — manufacturers who already have IEC 62619 certification may find IEC 62281 testing faster to complete since some test evidence transfers.
gap.zh: IEC 62281认证是塞舌尔SBS和项目规格在UN 38.3之外的附加要求。持有UN 38.3报告但无IEC 62281认证的中国制造商须从认可机构获取IEC 62281合格证明。IEC 62281测试套件与UN 38.3部分重叠——已持有IEC 62619认证的制造商可能发现IEC 62281测试完成更快，因为部分测试证据可转用。
gap.zht: IEC 62281認證是塞席爾SBS和項目規格在UN 38.3之外的附加要求。持有UN 38.3報告但無IEC 62281認證的中國製造商須從認可機構獲取IEC 62281合格證明。IEC 62281測試套件與UN 38.3部分重疊——已持有IEC 62619認證的製造商可能發現IEC 62281測試完成更快，因為部分測試證據可轉用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory per SBS and project specifications for BESS shipments to Seychelles
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 28164 covers portable cells; no mandatory IEC 62281 equivalent for stationary BESS

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62281:2019 certification from an accredited body is required alongside UN 38.3 test reports for BESS shipments to Seychelles. Chinese GB/T 28164 transport test documentation is not an accepted substitute. Manufacturers who already hold IEC 62619 certification should request a scope extension or combined test campaign for IEC 62281 — the test overlap reduces additional effort compared to starting from scratch.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 发往塞舌尔的BESS货运除UN 38.3测试报告外，还须提供来自认可机构的IEC 62281:2019认证。中国GB/T 28164运输测试文件不被接受为替代。已持有IEC 62619认证的制造商应申请范围扩展或IEC 62281联合测试项目——测试重叠降低了与从头开始相比的额外工作量。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 發往塞席爾的BESS貨運除UN 38.3測試報告外，還須提供來自認可機構的IEC 62281:2019認證。中國GB/T 28164運輸測試文件不被接受為替代。已持有IEC 62619認證的製造商應申請範圍擴展或IEC 62281聯合測試項目——測試重疊降低了與從頭開始相比的額外工作量。

requirement_topic.en: Port of entry and customs — Port Victoria, Seychelles
requirement_topic.zh: 入境港口与海关——塞舌尔维多利亚港
requirement_topic.zht: 入境港口與海關——塞席爾維多利亞港

summary.en: Port Victoria on Mahé island is the sole commercial entry port for Seychelles. All BESS equipment imports arrive by sea freight through Port Victoria. The Seychelles Revenue Commission (SRC) handles customs clearance. BESS systems may be subject to customs duties, value-added tax, and dangerous-goods handling surcharges. Pre-arrival notification to the port authority and SRC is required for dangerous goods shipments. All import documentation must be in English.
summary.zh: 马埃岛维多利亚港是塞舌尔唯一的商业入境港口。所有BESS设备进口均通过维多利亚港海运抵达。塞舌尔税务委员会（SRC）负责海关清关。BESS系统可能须缴纳关税、增值税和危险品处理附加费。危险品货运须在抵达前通知港口当局和SRC。所有进口文件须以英文提交。
summary.zht: 馬埃島維多利亞港是塞席爾唯一的商業入境港口。所有BESS設備進口均通過維多利亞港海運抵達。塞席爾稅務委員會（SRC）負責海關清關。BESS系統可能須繳納關稅、增值稅和危險品處理附加費。危險品貨運須在抵達前通知港口當局和SRC。所有進口文件須以英文提交。

standards_or_laws: Seychelles Revenue Commission — Customs and Excise Act

summary.en: China's export process for BESS includes customs export declaration via GACC, commodity inspection (CIQ) for electrical equipment, and dangerous-goods export certification via CAAC or MOT-approved agencies. Chinese export documentation is in Mandarin Chinese — English translations and internationally recognised danger labels (UN number, class, packing group) must be prepared for Seychelles import. SRC accepts English-language documentation only.
summary.zh: 中国BESS出口流程包括通过海关总署（GACC）进行海关出口申报、电气设备商品检验（CIQ）以及通过民航局或交通运输部认可机构进行危险品出口认证。中国出口文件以普通话编制——须为塞舌尔进口准备英文翻译及国际认可危险品标志（UN编号、类别、包装等级）。SRC仅接受英文文件。
summary.zht: 中國BESS出口流程包括通過海關總署（GACC）進行海關出口申報、電氣設備商品檢驗（CIQ）以及通過民航局或交通運輸部認可機構進行危險品出口認證。中國出口文件以普通話編制——須為塞席爾進口準備英文翻譯及國際認可危險品標誌（UN編號、類別、包裝等級）。SRC僅接受英文文件。

standards_or_laws: GACC — China Customs export declaration requirements
China MOT dangerous-goods sea transport regulations
IMDG Code (China is a signatory — same IMDG Code applies to Chinese exports)

gap.en: Logistics gap: Seychelles is a remote Indian Ocean island with port infrastructure scaled for a small-island economy. BESS shipments must be planned for: (1) limited container handling capacity at Port Victoria — project logistics planning with PUC/SEC and the local freight forwarder is essential; (2) longer transit times from China (typically 25–40 days via transhipment at hub ports such as Colombo or Port Louis); (3) all documentation in English; (4) SRC pre-clearance for dangerous goods before vessel arrival. There is no air freight option for large BESS systems.
gap.zh: 物流差距：塞舌尔是一个基础设施规模适应小岛屿经济体的偏远印度洋岛屿。BESS货运须规划：（1）维多利亚港集装箱装卸能力有限——与PUC/SEC及当地货运代理进行项目物流规划至关重要；（2）从中国运输时间较长（通常经科伦坡或路易港等枢纽港中转，需25–40天）；（3）所有文件须以英文提交；（4）船舶抵达前须完成SRC危险品预清关。大型BESS系统无空运选项。
gap.zht: 物流差距：塞席爾是一個基礎設施規模適應小島嶼經濟體的偏遠印度洋島嶼。BESS貨運須規劃：（1）維多利亞港集裝箱裝卸能力有限——與PUC/SEC及當地貨運代理進行項目物流規劃至關重要；（2）從中國運輸時間較長（通常經科倫坡或路易港等樞紐港中轉，需25–40天）；（3）所有文件須以英文提交；（4）船舶抵達前須完成SRC危險品預清關。大型BESS系統無空運選項。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Seychelles Revenue Commission and port authority requirements
mandatory_status.cn: N/A — China export customs are separate; IMDG compliance for sea export is mandatory

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] All BESS imports to Seychelles arrive via Port Victoria. Chinese exporters must engage a licensed Seychelles freight forwarder familiar with dangerous-goods handling at Port Victoria. Full English-language IMDG documentation must be submitted to SRC for pre-clearance before vessel arrival. Limited port handling capacity means project logistics must be planned well in advance — last-minute shipping adjustments are not feasible at Port Victoria's scale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 所有进入塞舌尔的BESS进口均通过维多利亚港抵达。中国出口商须委托熟悉维多利亚港危险品处理的持牌塞舌尔货运代理。须在船舶抵达前向SRC提交完整英文IMDG文件以完成预清关。港口装卸能力有限意味着项目物流须提前充分规划——在维多利亚港规模下，临时调整货运安排不可行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 所有進入塞席爾的BESS進口均通過維多利亞港抵達。中國出口商須委託熟悉維多利亞港危險品處理的持牌塞席爾貨運代理。須在船舶抵達前向SRC提交完整英文IMDG文件以完成預清關。港口裝卸能力有限意味著項目物流須提前充分規劃——在維多利亞港規模下，臨時調整貨運安排不可行。
